title: ITR portal: Govt says managed service provider was penalised in FY26 for outages and due date extension
summary: The government penalised the MSP of the income tax e-filing portal due to an extension of the ITR filing deadline caused by technical issues in FY 2025-26. Here's why an extension this year is unlikely.

title: Fixed Deposits: Should you park ₹10 lakh in one FD or split it? Pros and cons explained
summary: The better option depends on your financial objectives, liquidity needs, investment horizon and comfort with risk.

title: Pay commission: Salary, allowances, benefits — Check West Bengal 7th pay commission's full list of terms of reference
summary: The West Bengal government has officially constituted its 7th central pay commission. The finance department's resolution states that the panel will review allowances, salaries and service conditions for state government employees and pensioners.

title: ITR filing 2026: Do you need to disclose both taxable and exempt gifts received from friends and family?
summary: Gifts received during the financial year may be taxable and need to be reported in the income tax return. Taxpayers should be aware of exemptions and the new reporting field for non-taxable gifts to maintain compliance.&nbsp;

title: DA hike: Odisha announces 5% Dearness Allowance increase for employees, pensioners under pre-revised pay scales
summary: The Odisha government has approved a 5% increase in dearness allowance for state employees and pensioners, effective January 2026. Here's a look at who's eligible and how it works…

title: Monsoon respiratory infections: What your health insurance covers and when claims may be denied
summary: Seasonal respiratory infections can lead to expenses beyond a doctor's visit. Here's what your health insurance is likely to cover, where claims may be denied, and the policy features to check before the monsoon season.

title: Mid-cap funds beat all equity categories over 1, 3 and 5 years, here are the top-performing schemes
summary: Mid-cap funds have outperformed every equity mutual fund category over the last one, three and five years. Here's how the category fared and the schemes that delivered the highest returns.

title: ITR filing guide: How to report NSC and Kisan Vikas Patra interest
summary: The interest earned from National Savings Certificate (NSC) and Kisan Vikas Patra (KVP) is taxable, but only NSC offers a Section 80C benefit under the old tax regime. Here is how to report income correctly in your ITR before the 31 July deadline.&nbsp;

title: Can the Income Tax Department issue a notice after a taxpayer's death? Allahabad HC answers
summary: The Allahabad High Court has ruled that an income tax notice issued after a taxpayer's death is legally invalid. Here's what the judgment means for legal heirs and when the Income Tax Department can still recover dues.

title: Losing Wall Street binge premium! Why are Netflix shares in a freefall this year?
summary: Netflix shares have slumped despite higher revenue and profit as investors worry about slowing growth, weaker guidance and rich valuations. Wall Street is closely watching whether advertising, pricing power and engagement can sustain the streaming giant’s next phase of earnings growth.

title: US stocks today: US stocks open subdued after tech rout; Mideast, tariffs in focus
summary: Wall Street opened mixed after a sharp tech-led selloff, with the Dow inching higher while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq slipped. title: Bank of Baroda Q1 Results: Profit falls 72% to Rs 1,278 crore on one-off settlement hit
summary: Bank of Baroda's June-quarter profit fell 72% due to a Rs 5,680 crore one-off settlement, despite strong loan growth and stable asset quality. Excluding the exceptional item, profit rose, supported by higher net interest income and healthy retail lending.

title: Sebi clears IPOs of Intellius Recode, Nityas Gems & Jewellery
summary: Sebi approved the IPOs of Intellius Recode and Nityas Gems and Jewellery. Intellius plans to raise Rs 117 crore for AI-led digital worker development, while Nityas Gems will use fresh issue proceeds to fund working capital and business expansion.

title: India's SBI Card posts higher quarterly profit on asset quality boost
summary: SBI Cards announced an impressive profit surge attributed to lower provisions for bad loans. A remarkable rise in card spending highlighted robust consumer and corporate appetite, alongside a boost in total revenue propelled by increased transaction volumes across their card offerings. title: Welspun Corp Q1 Results: Profit nearly triples to Rs 1,048 crore

title: Sebi bars former Axis MF dealer Viresh Joshi from securities markets for 7 years front-running case
summary: Sebi has banned Viresh Joshi and Prijesh Kurani from the securities market for seven years. This action stems from a front-running case involving Axis Mutual Fund trades. title: Quote of the day by John Rogers: "All of us, all of the time, have to be on guard against groupthink"
summary: Veteran investor John Rogers emphasizes the constant need to guard against groupthink. This phenomenon occurs when individuals conform to group views instead of independent evaluation. Encouraging diverse perspectives and challenging assumptions improves decision-making in various settings.

title: Digital Realty raises annual FFO forecast on robust data center demand
summary: Digital Realty Trust has raised its forecast for funds from operations for the entire year, driven by a surge in leasing activity from cloud computing and AI users.
